proof: function[T0: Field, T1: Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1]) { FieldHom.new[T0, T1](x0.hom) = Option.some[FieldHom[T0, T1]](x0) }[F, E](f)
function[T0: Field, T1: Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1]) { FieldHom.new[T0, T1](x0.hom) = Option.some[FieldHom[T0, T1]](x0) }[F, E](g)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { Option.some[T0](x0) != Option.some[T0](x1) or x0 = x1 }[FieldHom[F, E]](g, f)
function[T0: Field, T1: Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1]) { is_field_hom[T0, T1](x0.hom) }[F, E](f)
function[T0: Field, T1: Field](x0: T0 -> T1) { is_ring_hom[T0, T1](x0) = is_field_hom[T0, T1](x0) }[F, E](f.hom)

goal: exists(k0: RingHom[F, E]) { RingHom.new[F, E](f.hom) = Option.some(k0) }
proof: function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: T0 -> T1) { not RingHom.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: RingHom[T0, T1]) { RingHom.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](k0) } }[F, E](f.hom)
function[T0: Field, T1: Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1]) { Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](field_hom_to_ring_hom[T0, T1](x0)) = RingHom.new[T0, T1](x0.hom) }[F, E](f)
let w0: F satisfy { f.hom(w0) != field_hom_to_ring_hom[F, E](f).hom(w0) }

function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: RingHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](x0) != RingHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[F, E](field_hom_to_ring_hom[F, E](f), f.hom, w0)
function[T0: Field](x0: T0) { x0 * x0.inverse = T0.1 or T0.0 = x0 }[F](a)
function[T0: Ring](x0: T0) { T0.0 * x0 = T0.0 }[E](f.hom(a.inverse))
function[T0: Field](x0: T0) { x0 * x0.inverse = T0.1 or T0.0 = x0 }[F](a)
